ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., Individual, Dealer) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Number of previous owners */,
  "km_driven" INTEGER /* Distance driven in kilometers */,
  "ex_showroom_price" REAL /* Ex-showroom price of the vehicle */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the vehicle in years */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that manufactured the vehicle */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the vehicle */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features of the vehicle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being listed */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller who listed the vehicle */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was listed */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle in the listing */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the listing */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the listing */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites for the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_listings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_listings_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., Individual, Dealer) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the seller */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* Profile picture URL of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "buyer_type" TEXT /* Type of buyer (e.g., Individual, Business) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the buyer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* Profile picture URL of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing that the sale is associated with */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was made */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle in the sale */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES vehicle_listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance policy */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle that the policy is associated with */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the insurance policy */,
  "policy_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was issued */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium of the insurance policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the insurance policy */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Coverage details of the insurance policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_insurance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_servicing" (
  "servicing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each servicing record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle that the servicing record is associated with */,
  "servicing_date" TEXT /* Date when the servicing was done */,
  "servicing_type" TEXT /* Type of servicing done (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the servicing */,
  "servicing_status" TEXT /* Status of the servicing */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Service provider */,
  "invoice_url" TEXT /* Invoice URL for the servicing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("servicing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_servicing_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle that the accident record is associated with */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date when the accident occurred */,
  "accident_type" TEXT /* Type of accident (e.g., collision, fire) */,
  "damage_cost" REAL /* Cost of damages resulting from the accident */,
  "accident_status" TEXT /* Status of the accident */,
  "insurance_claim" TEXT /* Insurance claim details */,
  "police_report_url" TEXT /* Police report URL for the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_accidents_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_theft" (
  "theft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theft record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle that the theft record is associated with */,
  "theft_date" TEXT /* Date when the theft occurred */,
  "theft_location" TEXT /* Location where the theft occurred */,
  "theft_status" TEXT /* Status of the theft */,
  "police_report_url" TEXT /* Police report URL for the theft */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward details for the stolen vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_theft_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
